info.description: One of the 3 nervous-system state outcomes for the Decoder quiz (Ventral / Sympathetic / Dorsal). The 3 state slugs are wired into the quiz logic — don't change them. Title, blurb, practice text, meditation URL, and CTA ARE editable.

state.description: Quiz logic uses Anna's brand language: 'clear', 'scrambled', 'faint'. Legacy polyvagal values (ventral / sympathetic / dorsal) kept in the enum for backwards compatibility with old records — don't use for new ones. Mapping: ventral≈clear, sympathetic≈scrambled, dorsal≈faint.

title.description: Result heading (e.g. 'Your signal: Ventral. You are mostly grounded right now.')

blurb.description: Body paragraph(s) explaining what this state means and how to read the result. Blank lines = paragraph breaks.

practice_intro.description: Short intro to the practice that follows. e.g. 'A 5-minute practice you can use right now, without equipment.'

meditation_url.description: URL to the meditation audio/video for this state (Bunny.net Stream, YouTube unlisted, MP3 link, etc.). Leave blank if the practice is text-only.

cta_label.description: Button text below the practice (the upsell action). Default goes to the REGULATED course.

cta_url.description: Where the CTA button links to.
